<!-- indicator: fig-mva-mortal-rate -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-mva-mortal-rate
#| fig-cap: 'Motor Vehicle Injury Mortality, Rate per 100,000 Population, 2018–2021'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Motor Vehicle Injury Mortality, Rate per 100,000 Population, 2018–2021.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-mva-mortal-rate", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
